  • 概要: 
  • 嵌套 | 
  • 字段 |

  • 方法
bupt.ta.storage

类 DataStorage

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.storage.DataStorage

  • public class DataStorage
extends java.lang.Object
    Thread-safe JSON file persistence for users, jobs, applications, and related entities.

    Data is stored under a data/ directory, resolved from TA_DATA_DIR / ta.data.dir, the project tree, or the servlet context. The DataStorage(javax.servlet.ServletContext) constructor seeds demo data when empty; DataStorage(String) is intended for tests and does not seed.

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      DataStorage(javax.servlet.ServletContext ctx) 
      DataStorage(java.lang.String baseDir) 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      Application addApplication(Application app)
      Assigns a new id and appends a PENDING application.
      ApplicationEvent addApplicationEvent(ApplicationEvent event)
      Assigns an id and appends a timeline event.
      EmailOtpRecord addEmailOtpRecord(EmailOtpRecord record)
      Assigns a new id and appends an OTP record.
      InterviewSlot addInterviewSlot(InterviewSlot slot)
      Assigns a new id and appends a slot.
      Job addJob(Job job)
      Assigns a new id and appends an OPEN job.
      SiteNotification addSiteNotification(SiteNotification n)
      Assigns an id and appends an in-app notification.
      User addUser(User user)
      Assigns a new id and appends a user.
      int countUnreadSiteNotificationsForUser(java.lang.String userId)
      Counts unread notifications for a user.
      boolean deleteInterviewSlot(java.lang.String slotId) 
      User findByEmail(java.lang.String email)
      Returns the user with the given email (case-insensitive), or null.
      User findByUsername(java.lang.String username)
      Returns the user with the given username, or null.
      EmailOtpRecord findLatestEmailOtp(java.lang.String email, java.lang.String purpose)
      Returns the most recent OTP for an email and purpose, or null.
      TAProfile findProfileByStudentId(java.lang.String studentId)
      Returns a profile by student id (case-insensitive), or null.
      User findUserById(java.lang.String id)
      Returns the user with the given id, or null.
      java.util.List<ApplicationEvent> getApplicationEventsByApplicationId(java.lang.String applicationId)
      Returns timeline events for one application, oldest first.
      java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.util.List<ApplicationEvent>> getApplicationEventsByApplicationIds(java.util.Collection<java.lang.String> applicationIds)
      Returns timeline events grouped by application id (empty list when none).
      java.util.List<Application> getApplicationsByApplicantId(java.lang.String applicantId)
      Returns applications submitted by one TA.
      java.util.List<Application> getApplicationsByJobId(java.lang.String jobId)
      Returns applications for one job.
      java.nio.file.Path getBasePath()
      Root directory containing JSON data files.
      InterviewEvaluation getInterviewEvaluationByApplicationId(java.lang.String applicationId)
      Returns the evaluation for an application, or null.
      java.util.List<InterviewEvaluation> getInterviewEvaluationsByJobId(java.lang.String jobId)
      Returns evaluations for a job, highest score first.
      InterviewSlot getInterviewSlotById(java.lang.String slotId)
      Returns a slot by id, or null.
      java.util.List<InterviewSlot> getInterviewSlotsByJobId(java.lang.String jobId)
      Returns slots for a job, sorted by start time.
      Job getJobById(java.lang.String id)
      Returns a job by id, or null.
      TAProfile getOrCreateProfile(java.lang.String userId)
      Returns an existing profile or a new in-memory profile (not persisted).
      TAProfile getProfileByUserId(java.lang.String userId)
      Returns the profile for a user id, or null.
      SiteNotification getSiteNotificationByIdForUser(java.lang.String notificationId, java.lang.String userId)
      Returns one notification if it belongs to the user, or null.
      java.util.List<SiteNotification> getSiteNotificationsForUser(java.lang.String userId)
      Returns notifications for a user, newest first.
      java.nio.file.Path getUploadPath()
      Directory for uploaded CV files.
      boolean hasApplied(java.lang.String jobId, java.lang.String applicantId)
      True if the applicant already has an active application for this job (blocks a new apply).
      boolean isJobSaved(java.lang.String userId, java.lang.String jobId)
      Returns whether the TA has saved the given job.
      java.lang.String issueRememberMeToken(java.lang.String userId)
      Creates a new remember-me token for the user and returns the raw cookie value.
      AdminSettings loadAdminSettings()
      Loads platform admin settings, or defaults when missing.
      AiApiSettings loadAiApiSettings()
      Loads the admin-managed LLM API settings, or default values when the file is missing/empty.
      java.util.List<ApplicationEvent> loadApplicationEvents()
      Loads all application timeline events.
      java.util.List<Application> loadApplications()
      Loads all applications from applications.json.
      java.util.List<AssignedModule> loadAssignedModulesForMo(java.lang.String moUserId)
      Returns modules assigned to an MO for job posting.
      java.util.List<EmailOtpRecord> loadEmailOtpRecords()
      Loads all email OTP records.
      java.util.List<InterviewEvaluation> loadInterviewEvaluations()
      Loads all interview evaluations.
      java.util.List<InterviewSlot> loadInterviewSlots()
      Loads all interview slots.
      java.util.List<Job> loadJobs()
      Loads all job postings from jobs.json.
      java.util.List<TAProfile> loadProfiles()
      Loads all TA profiles from profiles.json.
      java.util.List<SiteNotification> loadSiteNotifications()
      Loads all in-app site notifications.
      java.util.List<User> loadUsers()
      Loads all users from users.json.
      int markAllSiteNotificationsReadForUser(java.lang.String userId)
      Marks every notification for the user as read; returns how many changed.
      boolean markSiteNotificationRead(java.lang.String notificationId, java.lang.String userId) 
      int markSiteNotificationsReadForUser(java.lang.String userId, java.util.Collection<java.lang.String> notificationIds)
      Marks selected notifications as read; returns how many changed.
      int markSiteNotificationsUnreadForUser(java.lang.String userId, java.util.Collection<java.lang.String> notificationIds)
      Marks selected notifications as unread; returns how many changed.
      boolean markSiteNotificationUnread(java.lang.String notificationId, java.lang.String userId) 
      void revokeAllRememberMeTokensForUser(java.lang.String userId)
      Invalidates all remember-me tokens for the given user.
      void revokeRememberMeToken(java.lang.String rawToken)
      Invalidates a single remember-me token.
      void saveAdminSettings(AdminSettings settings)
      Persists platform admin settings.
      void saveAiApiSettings(AiApiSettings settings)
      Persists admin-managed LLM API settings.
      void saveApplication(Application app)
      Inserts or replaces an application by id.
      void saveAssignedModulesForMo(java.lang.String moUserId, java.util.List<AssignedModule> modules)
      Replaces the module list assigned to an MO.
      void saveEmailOtpRecord(EmailOtpRecord record)
      Inserts or replaces an OTP record by id.
      InterviewEvaluation saveInterviewEvaluation(InterviewEvaluation evaluation)
      Inserts or updates an evaluation keyed by application id.
      void saveInterviewSlot(InterviewSlot slot)
      Inserts or replaces a slot by id.
      void saveJob(Job job)
      Inserts or replaces a job by id.
      void saveProfile(TAProfile profile)
      Inserts or replaces a TA profile by user id.
      void saveUser(User user)
      Inserts or replaces a user by id.
      boolean setJobSaved(java.lang.String userId, java.lang.String jobId, boolean saved)
      Adds or removes a saved job for the TA.
      void syncJobStatusesWithDeadlines()
      Persists any OPEN jobs whose application deadline is already past as CLOSED so listings and TA search stay consistent.
      User validateRememberMeToken(java.lang.String rawToken)
      Resolves a remember-me token to a user, or null if invalid or expired.

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 构造器详细资料

      • DataStorage

        public DataStorage(javax.servlet.ServletContext ctx)
        参数:
        ctx - servlet context used to resolve the data directory

      • DataStorage

        public DataStorage(java.lang.String baseDir)
        参数:
        baseDir - parent directory; JSON files are stored in baseDir/data

                          java.lang.String applicantId)
                   throws java.io.IOException

        java.io.IOException
